items.briefing:
A critical zero-day vulnerability in Microsoft Exchange is currently being actively exploited, with no patch yet available from Microsoft. Organisations using Exchange for email should contact their IT support immediately to assess exposure and consider temporary mitigations. Separately, a new report highlights that security concerns remain the number one barrier to AI adoption across organisations — a relevant consideration for RTOs exploring AI tools for learning delivery or administration.

**Practical tip:** If your organisation uses Microsoft Exchange, ask your IT provider today whether your system is exposed to the current zero-day and what protective measures are in place.
